scripts.ios:clear-all: rm -rf node_modules && cd ios && rm -rf Pods && rm -rf Podfile.lock && cd .. && yarn install && cd ios && pod install && cd ..
scripts.android:copy-service-json: cp ../Android/google-services.json android/app/ || echo '⚠️ google-services.json não encontrada em ../Android/hubapp-key.keystore'
scripts.android:copy-keystore: cp ../Android/hubapp-key.keystore android/app/ || echo '⚠️  Keystore não encontrada em ../Android/hubapp-key.keystore'
scripts.android:clean: cd android && ./gradlew clean || (rm -rf app/.cxx app/build && ./gradlew clean) && cd ..
scripts.android:bundle-js: mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets && npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res
scripts.android:install-apk: adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk && echo '✅ APK instalado com sucesso!'
scripts.android:release-apk: yarn android:copy-keystore && yarn android:copy-service-json && yarn android:clean && yarn android:bundle-js && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && echo '✅ APK Release gerado em: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk' && yarn android:install-apk
scripts.android:release-aab: yarn android:copy-keystore && yarn android:copy-service-json && yarn android:clean && yarn android:bundle-js && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && cd .. && echo '✅ AAB Release gerado em: android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab'
